zh.lifeSummary: 當Arend van Amstel IJsselstein於1287年出生在荷蘭武特雷特時，他的父親Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein27歲，母親Bertha van Arkel23歲。他於1310年6月25日與Maria d'Avesnes結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1363年2月12日在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦享年76歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arend van Amstel IJsselstein于1287年出生在荷兰武特雷特时，他的父亲Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein27岁，母亲Bertha van Arkel23岁。他于1310年6月25日与Maria d'Avesnes结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1363年2月12日在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦享年76岁，埋葬在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Amstel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Mayer, Pinkus.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from German Hamster ‘hoarder’.

nameMeanings.name: Arend
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from the personal name Arend of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements arn ‘eagle’ + wald ‘rule’.

variants.name: Arensberg
meanings: North German and Swedish (of German origin): habitational name from a place called as ‘eagle's mountain’ (see   Arend   and   Berg  ), probably Ahrensberg in Mecklenburg. Compare   Darensbourg  .

variants.name: Aardema
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Frans, Klaas.
West Frisian and Dutch:
patronymic, formed with the Frisian suffix -ma ‘(one of the) men of’, from the personal name Aard (a variant of Arend ).

variants.name: Arends
meanings: Dutch and German: patronymic from the personal name Arend , inflected with genitive -s.

variants.name: Arendt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Armin, Dieter, Gunter, Hans, Hedwig, Monika, Wolfram.
German: variant of   Arend   and   Arndt  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of the German personal name as a surname, in part probably on account of its resemblance to the Jewish name   Aaron  . Compare   Ahrens  .

variants.name: Arensdorf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Amie, Patrice.
Altered form of German Ahrensdorf: habitational name from a place called Ahrensdorf, ‘village of Ahrens’ (see Arend and Dorf ). There are several places called Ahrensdorf north and south of Berlin.
Luxembourgish: cognate of 1 above.

en.lifeSummary: When Arend van Amstel IJsselstein was born in 1287, in Utrecht, Netherlands, his father, Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein, was 27 and his mother, Bertha van Arkel, was 23. He married Maria d'Avesnes on 25 June 1310. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 12 February 1363, in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands, at the age of 76, and was buried in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arend van Amstel IJsselstein est né en 1287, à Utrecht, Pays-Bas, son père, Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Bertha van Arkel, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Maria d'Avesnes le 25 juin 1310. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 février 1363, à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arend van Amstel IJsselstein 1287 in Utrecht, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein 27 und seine Mutter Bertha van Arkel 23. Er hat am 25. Juni 1310 Maria d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Februar 1363 im Alter von 76 Jahren in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande und wurde in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arend van Amstel IJsselstein è nato il nel 1287 nel Utrecht, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Bertha van Arkel, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Maria d'Avesnes il 25 giugno 1310. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1363, nel IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Arend van Amstel IJsselsteinが1287年にオランダウトレチトで生まれた時，父Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselsteinは27歳，母Bertha van Arkelは23歳であった。1310年6月25日にMaria d'Avesnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1363年2月12日にオランダウトレチトイジセルステインで76歳で死去し，オランダウトレチトイジセルステインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Arend van Amstel IJsselstein(이)가 1287년 네덜란드 우트레ch트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha van Arkel(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1310년 6월 25일 Maria d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1363년 2월 12일 네덜란드 우트레ch트 이j셀스타인에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레ch트 이j셀스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arend van Amstel IJsselstein nasceu em 1287, em Utrecht, Países Baixos, seu pai, Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Bertha van Arkel, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria d'Avesnes em 25 de junho de 1310. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1363, em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arend van Amstel IJsselstein родился в 1287 г. в местности утречт, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha van Arkel, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria d'Avesnes 25 июня 1310 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 12 февраля 1363 г. в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arend van Amstel IJsselstein nació en 1287, en Utrecht, Países Bajos, su papá, Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Bertha van Arkel, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Maria d'Avesnes el 25 de junio de 1310. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1363, en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos.
